knowledge: I am sharing this with you because I want you to think about where fear may be driving you right now.

knowledge: Because you have the power to replace any bad habit in your life with a better one.
original: Repeat after me: there is nothing wrong with you. You just have habits that are getting in the way of your dreams. And that’s great news! Why? Because you have the power to replace any bad habit in your life with a better one.
source_path: 20210612 Repeat after me- there is nothing wrong with you..md

knowledge: Your job is to know them and communicate them.
original: Your boundaries are your responsibility. Your job is to know them and communicate them. What’s NOT your job? Managing someone’s reaction to your boundary. What’s one boundary you know you need to set? What are you worried about happening when you do? Tell me in the responses!
